---
description: "Use when preparing tasks, pull requests, or onboarding docs for freelancers. Defines delivery standards, acceptance criteria, and documentation expectations."
name: "Freelancer Handoff"
---
# Freelancer Handoff Standards

## Task Brief Minimum
- Goal and gameplay context.
- Files/modules allowed to change.
- Contract constraints (slots, anchors, naming, IDs).
- Acceptance tests and done criteria.

## Pull Request Checklist
- Uses approved naming conventions.
- Respects prefab contract hierarchy.
- Keeps vendor code untouched.
- Includes migration notes for data/schema changes.
- Includes short usage notes for new tools/components.

## Content Submission Rules
- New items/spells/enemies include stable IDs.
- Visual assets align with slot and Sprite Library label schema.
- Animation clips follow 8-direction naming contract.

## Documentation Requirement
Each subsystem change adds or updates a local README with:
- Purpose.
- Setup steps.
- Dependencies.
- Known limitations.
